blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,665 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.8" of snow, highs of 28°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
